perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a middle-aged man wearing glasses and a grey cap, holding a blue iPhone and speaking enthusiastically to the camera. (2) He transitions into showing his phone screen, demonstrating the first feature of 'Visual Intelligence' by screenshotting a concert poster and using the 'Add to Calendar' function. (3) Next, he screenshots a photo of grilled beef tongue on a webpage and clicks 'Image Search' to reveal related search results. (4) In the final demonstration, he points the phone's camera at a coffee machine in the background, selects 'Ask', and a ChatGPT-powered text box appears describing the object. (5) The man returns to a full-screen view, gives a thumbs up, and points to the camera while concluding his talk.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic background music with a steady, upbeat tempo starts immediately and continues throughout the video. (2) A male voice speaks in Traditional Chinese with an excited, fast, and friendly tone. (3) When the speaker interacts with the phone screen, subtle digital clicking sound effects are heard to emphasize the touch actions. (4) The audio environment is clean, suggesting a studio or quiet indoor recording with no significant external ambient noise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: '更新iOS26視覺智慧的 三種用法' (Updating 3 ways to use iOS 26 Visual Intelligence) appears as a title at the start. (2) Functional text: Chronological subtitles in Traditional Chinese translate the speaker's narration. (3) Interface text: English UI elements such as 'Add to Calendar', 'Image Search', 'Ask', and 'ChatGPT' are visible during the phone demonstrations. (4) Branding: Social media handles '3c有意思tim哥' and '@3ctim' are permanently displayed in the top left corner.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Feature 1 Demo -> Feature 2 Demo -> Feature 3 Demo -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim) appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian male with short hair, wearing glasses, a grey newsboy cap, and a pink 'Roots' brand T-shirt with a green beaver logo.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern indoor environment featuring a light-colored wall, a TV screen, and a desk with a coffee machine.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Tutorial 1 -> Feature Tutorial 2 -> Feature Tutorial 3 -> Closing Call-to-Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video is an educational tech tutorial aimed at teaching iPhone users how to utilize the new 'Visual Intelligence' AI capabilities in iOS. By demonstrating practical scenarios—such as adding events from posters, searching for food, and identifying real-world objects using ChatGPT integration—the creator provides immediate value to his audience and showcases the efficiency of Apple's latest software updates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on demonstrating the features of a specific product brand (Apple/iOS) and uses an AI service (ChatGPT).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The creator (Tim) is known for his signature newsboy cap and rapid-fire, high-energy delivery style, often using a blue iPhone for demonstrations.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a humorous 'iOS 26' text hook, likely as a satirical comment on the frequency of updates or to grab attention, while actually demonstrating iOS 18/AI features.
